reviews.comment:
Mala atención, esperas innecesarias, precios muy elevados

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, unnecessary waiting times, very high prices
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwbTk2X2NREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio. Estuvimos 2 horas esperando que descargue 1 camión de combustible, cuando el promedio de descarga es la mitad del tiempo. Los playeros se te ríen en la cara. Una completa falta de respeto y cero empatía. Eviten ir, me lo van a agradecer.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. We waited two hours for a fuel truck to unload, when the average unloading time is half that. The beach attendants laugh in your face. A complete lack of respect and zero empathy. Avoid going there; you'll thank me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwczZUY0JnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo pero ya esta quedando chica por la alta demanda de gente que para.. deberia habilitar otra playa y otros surtidores..

(Translated by Google)
Very nice, but it's already getting too small due to the high demand from people stopping there... they should open another beach and more gas pumps...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwNDVxdnpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La vez que pasamos habían muchos autos, estuve 1 hora para poder cargar nafta

(Translated by Google)
The last time we went there were a lot of cars, it took me an hour to get gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwaWIzRFpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hay que tratar de no llegar a cargar aquí, mucha espera ,encima le cargan a los que van con bidones o botellones de agua .Se recomienda cargar bastante en santiago capital para no tener que depender de combustible en ojo de agua .En la confiteria el lugar está bien pero es tanta la demora, que para comprar también hay que esperar .

(Translated by Google)
Try to avoid filling up here; the wait is very long, and they even prioritize people with jerrycans or water jugs. It's recommended to fill up in Santiago (the capital) so you don't have to rely on fuel in Ojo de Agua. The gas station is okay, but the wait is so long that you have to wait to buy anything too.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwOGRURDNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los playeros , mala atención en el full según quién te atienda

(Translated by Google)
